payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark chair showing a triangular seat corner and a vertical backrest as a dark silhouette against a lighter background; single front leg and frame visible, appears to be a dark-stained wooden or solid-frame chair in low lighting, photographed close to camera (approx. 1.2 m).
